resultList.dtldesc: Step into the realm of luxurious living with this exceptional opportunity - a stunning 3 BHK Flat For Sale in the prestigious Alekhya Palm Woods, located in the heart of the Financial District, Hyderabad. Property SpecificationsPresenting an exquisite 3 BHK Flat available for sale in the prestigious Alekhya Palm Woods. This semi-furnished flat boasts a spacious super area of 1,735 square feet, with a comfortable carpet area spanning 1,730 square feet, ensuring ample living space on the 4th floor of a well-appointed 9-floor building.With a UDS of 59 square yards, this flat offers an excellent investment opportunity. It comprises three bedrooms, each with an attached bathroom featuring Western-style facilities and equipped with geysers for your comfort. The living space extends to three attached balconies, each offering a delightful road view.This flat is thoughtfully designed, featuring separate living and dining areas, enhancing the convenience and comfort of your daily life. In addition to the bedrooms, there is a modular kitchen complete with a chimney, cabinets, granite platform, and sink. The kitchen also has a piped gas connection for efficient cooking, and a utility area is attached for added convenience.The flooring throughout the flat is elegantly finished with vitrified tiles, adding a touch of sophistication to the interiors. Moreover, this flat is Vaastu compliant and faces the East, ensuring a bright and vibrant living space.Facilities This 3 BHK flat  offers two covered parking spaces, 247 water supply, 100 power backup, security with a guard and CCTV surveillance, and the convenience of three elevators for easy access between floors. Locality Nestled in a highly strategic location, this 3 BHK flat enjoys proximity to the prominent Wipro Junction in Nanakramguda. It stands as a testament to convenience and accessibility, offering a mere 5-minute walk to reach all major IT companies, making it an ideal choice for IT professionals.For families with educational needs, schools are conveniently located within a 1-kilometer radius, ensuring that your childrens educational requirements are easily met. Similarly, for healthcare concerns, hospitals are also within a 1-kilometer radius, providing quick access to medical facilities.Shopaholics and those seeking daily essentials will appreciate the convenience of malls and supermarkets, all situated within a 1-kilometer radius. Public transportation options are readily available, simplifying your daily commute.For your banking needs, banks and ATMs are easily accessible, providing hassle-free financial services. The railway station is just a 15-minute drive away at Raidurga Station, ensuring that you have convenient rail connectivity. Additionally, the metro station is a short 10-minute drive away, offering efficient transportation options for your convenience.

resultList.dtldesc: Spacious and thoughtfully designed 3 BHK Flat For Sale in Lanco Hills, Manikonda, Hyderabad, in a stunning raised gated community. This West-facing, vaastu-friendly home is a combination of comfort, elegance, and positive living space.Property SpecificationsProvides a super built-up area of 2484 sq ft. Located on the ground floor of a 32-storey building, this semi-furnished flat is well-planned with wardrobes and ACs already fitted to provide comfort and convenience.The house has three large bedrooms, each with a maximum carpet area to provide a spacious feel. There are four bathrooms in all  three attached and one common  all equipped with western fixtures, geysers, and high-quality sanitary fittings. A single balcony that is attached to the living room offers a soothing garden view, complementing the serene ambience.The design features a separate dining and living space, thus, the flat is ideal for family functions. The modular kitchen is equipped with a chimney and a piped gas connection for convenient cooking. There is a utility area attached to the kitchen for added convenience in daily life. Vitrified tile flooring throughout the flat provides a neat and sophisticated appearance thats low maintenance.FacilitiesThe flat is equipped with great amenities like 2 covered parking areas, 247 water supply from borewell and corporation, 100 power backup, 247 security personnel, and CCTV protection for security. Additionally, the building is equipped with a lift for easy and convenient movement.The residents have access to luxury facilities like a clubhouse, swimming pool, and gym, which can be a great source of recreation and exercise within the complex.LocalityTactically placed close to the Lanco Hills landmark, the flat is well-connected. Well-known schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets are all at a distance of 3 to 5 km. Banks and ATMs are readily accessible nearby. Public transport is readily available with regular buses and autos at hand, and the Raidurg Metro Station is just 3 km away, making it convenient to commute within Hyderabad.
